Original Creator: AIHASTO

This audio clip is a recording from the video game "MiSide", developed by AIHASTO. All rights to the original audio belong to the developers. This capture is used under the "Fair Use" doctrine for educational purposes within a computer graphics school assignment. No copyright infringement is intended.
